title: Scaling Distributed Systems with Rust
description: Learn how to leverage Rust's memory safety and concurrency primitives to build high-performance distributed systems that scale effortlessly.

title: The Future of WebAssembly in the Browser
description: Exploring how WebAssembly is moving beyond simple modules to power complex, performance-critical applications directly in the browser.

title: AI-Driven Development: Myths vs. Reality
description: A deep dive into how LLMs are actually changing the software development lifecycle and what developers should focus on to stay relevant.

title: Zero Trust Security for Cloud Native Apps
description: How to implement a Zero Trust architecture in Kubernetes and other cloud-native environments without sacrificing developer velocity.

title: Mastering CSS Grid and Subgrid
description: Unlock the full potential of CSS layouts with modern Grid techniques, including the newly supported subgrid for complex nested layouts.

title: Quantum Computing: A Developer's Perspective
description: You don't need a PhD in physics to start writing quantum algorithms. We'll show you how to get started with Q# and IBM Quantum.
